title: Enderism
description: Mid and Endgame Expansion and Tweaks mod
body:
# Enderism _Not just about The End_ ![Enderism Features](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/diamonddevv/enderism/1.19/src/main/resources/assets/enderism/thumbnail.png) --- Enderism is a mod that focuses on expanding Minecraft's mid-to-end game content, with more collectables, resources, and utilities.
![Fabric](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Fsupported%2Ffabric_vector.svg&n=-1) ![Quilt](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Fsupported%2Fquilt_vector.svg&n=-1) ![No Forge Port](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Funsupported%2Fforge_vector.svg&n=-1)
![Fabric Api](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Frequires%2Ffabric-api_vector.svg&n=-1) ![Modrinth](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Favailable%2Fmodrinth_vector.svg&n=-1)
[![Ko-Fi](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Fdonate%2Fkofi-plural_vector.svg&n=-1)](https://ko-fi.com/diamonddevv)
## Features: - Enchantments and Curses for Elytra - New Materials for Armor and Tool Upgrades - [Simple Trims](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-trims) Integration - New purposeful and decorative blocks - A food item created with the intent of providing a balanced form of long-distance teleportation and also to facilitate multiple multiplayer scenarios - Optional QOL balances - More to come! ---
